description: Baseline for 2026-05-17 maintenance session: 6325 LOC, 22 files, 271 dup lines, type_errors=0
Extract uw() helper for updateWidget calls in autoresearch/index.ts - increased LOC and dup score
Move git helpers (getGitShortHash, gitAutoCommit, gitAutoRevert) from autoresearch/index.ts to runner.ts. Reduced max file from 811→758 lines.
Move loop helpers (COMPLETE_MARKER, appendTextFragments, hasCompleteMarker, loopFollowUpMessage) from index.ts to runner.ts. Reduced max file 758→719 lines.
Extract parseRunEntry helper from reconstructState. Reduced function from 51→42 lines, complexity_score 3→2.
Delete unused persistence.ts module and 5 associated tests. File count 22→21, LOC -48.
Merge render.ts into types.ts. File count 21→20, reduces module discovery cost.
Add notifyError helper in goal/index.ts to deduplicate error notification pattern. Neutral score (LOC increase offsets dup decrease).
Merge plan-mode/utils.ts into index.ts — failed because tests import utils directly and index.ts has runtime dependencies (@earendil-works/pi-tui) unavailable in test environment.
